goal_results.evidence: init.ts:269 — 'void showWelcomeLogin(providerKeys).catch(...)' replaces the blocking 'await showWelcomeLogin(providerKeys)'. Grep confirms 'await showWelcomeLogin' no longer appears in init.ts. The call is fire-and-forget with error handling via .catch().

init.ts:200 defines awaitWithTimeout utility. init.ts:255 wraps restoreCredentials in 6s timeout: 'awaitWithTimeout("Credential restore", 6000, restoreCredentials(...))'. init.ts:263 wraps providerKeys.list() in 3s timeout: 'awaitWithTimeout("Provider key lookup", 3000, providerKeys.list())'. bootstrap.ts:69 wraps overall initTaskpane in 12s timeout: 'awaitWithTimeout("Taskpane initialization", 12_000, initTaskpane(...))'. All three levels of timeout with graceful fallback (try/catch with console.warn).

init.ts:820-829 defines createRuntimeFromUi with try/catch that calls showToast on error. Used at init.ts:1065 (createRuntime action) and init.ts:1150 (sidebar.onCreateTab). Test gates F2P Gate 1 and F2P Gate 2 both pass.

init.ts:146-168 defines normalizeRuntimeTools that deduplicates by name (Set) and validates via isRuntimeAgentTool. Used at init.ts:656 to wrap the combined tool array. Test gate F2P Gate 2 also checks for this.

judge_notes: All 4 goals are met. The agent's patch closely mirrors the oracle's canonical fix: (1) showWelcomeLogin changed from await to void+catch fire-and-forget, (2) awaitWithTimeout utility added with 6s credential restore, 3s provider lookup, and 12s overall init timeouts, (3) createRuntimeFromUi helper with try/catch+showToast used in both sidebar and action contexts, (4) normalizeRuntimeTools for dedup+validation. Test.sh gates all pass (F2P Gates 1-4, both upstream gates). Score = 0.4+0.4+0.1+0.1 = 1.0.
